mapper.insert:
/* 무효전력 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_reactive ( site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, rctv_val, neg_rctv_val, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.deviceId}, #{entity.stdTimestamp}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.rctvVal}, #{entity.negRctvVal}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: /* 무효전력 상세조회 */ SELECT rctv_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, rctv_val, neg_rctv_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_reactive WHERE rctv_idx = #{rctvIdx}

/* 무효전력 목록조회 */ SELECT rctv_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, rctv_val, neg_rctv_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_reactive
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}

/* 마지막 무효전력 상세조회 */ SELECT rctv_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, rctv_val, neg_rctv_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_reactive WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY std_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

/* 무효전력 상세조회ByUnique */ SELECT rctv_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, rctv_val, neg_rctv_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_reactive WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} AND std_timestamp = #{stdTimestamp}

/* 무효전력 목록조회 */ SELECT site_id, std_timestamp, std_date, SUM(rctv_val) rctv_val, SUM(neg_rctv_val) neg_rctv_val FROM tb_reactive WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND std_timestamp BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end} GROUP BY site_id, std_timestamp, std_date ORDER BY std_timestamp
